audit_items.proof_trace: All four callers of rewrite_session_init() either NULL-check the return value before dereference (session.c:215 inside rewrite_session_var_set_f) or explicitly discard it via (void) cast / by not storing it (rwm.c:405, conn.c:668, rewrite.c:60), so no dereference of a potentially-NULL return ever occurs. Downstream functions that look up sessions via rewrite_session_find() all NULL-check that result before any pointer dereference, providing a second layer of defense.
